name: The Wolf of Bastardville
description:
Warning: Possible Non-con.

You have found yourself at a cabin overlooking a serene, placid lake. Not a human around for miles. No one to bother you, no one to help you, no one to hear you scream...

Contains: Big dick werewolf, musk, fur, knots, possible non-con, she doesn't speak, big girl, bad girl, dog meat, rough, saliva, drool, wet dog smell.
creator: Oilyboys
